title: Aurora, 99392, Palm Pals Topper Santa Hat 5In, Soft Toy, Red & white
features: Introducing Palm Pals Topper Santa Hat, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Santa Hat soft toy is a red and white coloured cute and cuddly smiling santa hat which is filled with beans that perfectly fit into your palm. Great for a little cuddling!

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Topper Santa Hat is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable smiling santa hat-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Seasonal collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Topper Santa Hat measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for Christmas, a birthday or as a general gift. Everyone will fall in love with this adorable red and white hat coloured Santa hat which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
